description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

This notice announces additional entries for the "Hanno Living Guide 2026."

The following medical facilities and clinics that were accidentally omitted from the April 2026 (Reiwa 8) edition have been corrected and added as follows:

【Pharmacies (Insurance-covered)】 Page 67 addition
• Heart Pharmacy Hanno Okawara Branch   935-3 Okawara   Phone: 980-5195

【Treatment facilities, etc. (Insurance-covered)】 Page 69 additions
• Mura Bone-Setting Clinic   46-3 Kawadera   Judo Therapy (Judotherapy)   Phone: 911-9616
• Mura Acupuncture & Moxibustion Clinic   46-3 Kawadera   Acupuncture & Moxibustion   Phone: 911-9616

We apologize for any inconvenience caused by these omissions.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/13487.html
summary: ℹ️ Additions to the Hanno Living Guide 2026
